description_long: This object is a rich, chocolate-colored muffin with a cracked, textured surface, featuring several embedded toppings that appear to be both white and dark chocolate chips. The muffin has a slightly domed, irregular shape, with visible cracks and a soft, crumbly appearance, suggesting a moist interior. The surface is matte and rough, with the chips partially melted and slightly glossy, standing out against the darker base. There is no visible wrapper or decorative paper, and the muffin is presented without any frosting or icing. No additional decorative elements are present, and the muffin is shown isolated, floating with no visible support or plate. The overall look is appetizing and homemade, with a rustic, hand-baked quality.
description: A chocolate muffin with a cracked, rough surface and visible white and dark chocolate chips, shown without a wrapper or frosting. The muffin appears soft, moist, and rustic, floating with no visible support.
description_view_0: The muffin is seen from above, highlighting its cracked surface and the distribution of white and dark chocolate chips.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the muffin's relatively flat, disc-like shape and the thickness of its body.
description_view_2: Another angled side view shows the muffin's edge and the protrusion of some chocolate chips.
description_view_3: A top-down view clearly displays the arrangement of chocolate chips and the rough, cracked texture of the muffin's surface.
attribute_topping_type: white chocolate chips, dark chocolate chips
